brand.name: Anamata Kāhui
brand.tagline: He papaho hapori e whakakotahi ana i ngā pūkōrero, rangahau, toi auaha, me te hangarau mō Aotearoa.

home.lede: Ko Anamata Kāhui te papaho hapori e whakakotahi ana i Anamata Records, te Rangatiratanga Reo me te Rangahau, te Toi Auaha, me te Hangarau. He mea hanga mā ngā kaiwaiata, kaimātai, kiritaki hoki e hiahia ana kia kotahi te wāhi — kia kaua hoki e kaiponutia.
home.branchesLede: He peka tō tēnā, ā, he taputapu, he papamahi anō — engari kotahi tonu te pūnaha takiuru, kotahi tonu te tauanga raraunga, kotahi tonu te tūāpapa ahurea.
home.closerTitle: I hanga ki Supabase + Next.js. I tukunga ki Vercel.
home.closerLede: Ko te RLS e whāiti ana i ia rēkōta ki tōna kaipupuri. Ko te mema peka e whakahaere ana i ngā papamahi e kitea ana e koe. Ka tere tonu ngā huarahi tūmatanui i te taha o te tihi Whatunga.
home.nzsISlot: Whakamāori NZSL — hei ā muri ake

records.name: Anamata Records
records.tagline: He peka puoro — tomokanga kaiwaiata, raupapatanga tukunga, putunga STEM, me ngā tatauranga tihi me te moni whakahoki.

artistPortal.title: Tomokanga kaiwaiata
artistPortal.body: Ka whakahaere ia kaiwaiata i tōna rōpere, ngā tukunga, me ngā moni whakahoki i tētahi wāhi kotahi.

releasePipeline.title: Raupapatanga tukunga
releasePipeline.body: Ka whai mai i tētahi tukunga mai i te hukihuki tae atu ki te tukunga kua whakaritea, ki ngā tatauranga muri-tukunga.

stemVault.title: Putunga STEM
stemVault.body: He putunga haumaru, he putunga putanga mō ngā mastatī, ngā STEM, me ngā toi tautoko.

streamRoyalty.title: Tihi me te Moni
streamRoyalty.body: Ngā tatauranga mahi mai i Spotify, Apple Music, me ngā kaiwhakaputa kiritaki.

research.name: Rangatiratanga Reo me te Rangahau
research.tagline: He pouaka mātauranga, he puna kōnae, he kaupapa ā-whenua mō te whakapūmau i te reo.

documentVault.title: Pouaka kōnae
documentVault.body: He puna kōnae rapu mō ngā pūtake taketake, ngā tuhituhi, me ngā tuhipoka ā-whenua.

fieldProjects.title: Kaupapa ā-whenua
fieldProjects.body: He kaiwhakahaere ora mō ngā mahi ā-whenua e haere ana, me ngā raraunga kaitiaki.

languageTools.title: Taputapu reo
languageTools.body: He taputapu kupu Māori — oropuare, auau, me ngā tohu reo-ā-iwi.

publications.title: Ngā whakaputa
publications.body: Ngā tuhinga kua arotakea me ngā tuhinga hapori, me te whakapiri DOI.

arts.name: Toi Auaha
arts.tagline: He toi ā-kanohi, he whakaaturanga pāpāho matihiko, me ngā kōpaki hoahoa ahurea.

galleries.title: Ngā whare toi
galleries.body: He kohinga kua kōhukihia o ngā mahi ā-kanohi — taumira teitei, he kōrero tautoko hoki.

digitalMedia.title: Pāpāho matihiko
digitalMedia.body: Ngā mahi auaha, nekeneke, tauwhitiwhiti, e tukunga ana i te taha o te tihi Whatunga.

portfolios.title: Ngā kōpaki
portfolios.body: He kōpaki mō ia kaitoi, me te whakapapa me ngā hītori whakaaturanga.

commissions.title: Ngā tono
commissions.body: He kaiwhakawhiwhi tono, kaiwhakahaere kaupapa hoki mō ngā mahi i tonoa.

dev.name: Hangarau me te Whakawhanake
dev.tagline: He kaupapa pūmanawa, he taputapu kiritaki, me ngā mahi aunoa ā-roto mō te Kāhui.

clientTools.title: Taputapu kiritaki
clientTools.body: Ngā papamahi me ngā taputapu i hanga mō ngā hoa mahi o te Kāhui.

openSource.title: Pūmanawa tuwhera
openSource.body: Ngā wharepukapuka me ngā tīmatanga e tukunga ana i raro i ngā raihana atawhai.

automation.title: Mahi aunoa
automation.body: Ngā tuhinga ā-roto me ngā raina mō ngā mahi kōpaki, tukunga, me ngā tatauranga.

apiConsole.title: Tauranga API
apiConsole.body: He huarahi whakamana mō te whakahaere i ngā ki API me ngā huna tūhono.

about.title: Mō Anamata Kāhui
about.lede: Ko Anamata Kāhui te tātai matihiko e kawe ana i a Anamata Records, te Rangatiratanga Reo me te Rangahau, te Toi Auaha, me te Hangarau i raro i tētahi tuanui kotahi. He peka tō tēnā, ā, he papamahi, he taputapu anō — engari kotahi tonu te pūnaha takiuru, kotahi tonu te tauanga raraunga, kotahi tonu te tūāpapa ahurea.

tino.title: Tino rangatiratanga
tino.body: He tino rangatiratanga i ia taumata — ka mahi te papaho mō ngā tāngata e hanga ana, kaua mōna anō.

kaitiaki.title: Kaitiakitanga
kaitiaki.body: Ka whakahaerehia ngā raraunga ahurea e ngā hapori nō reira. Ko te RLS, ngā raraunga whakaaetanga, me ngā huarahi tātari ka whakarae.

whanaunga.title: Whanaungatanga
whanaunga.body: Ka tiria e ngā peka e whā tētahi tuakiri, tētahi pūnaha takiuru, me tētahi tikanga whakahaere. Kāore rātou e tū wehe.

about.getInvolvedLede: Ahakoa he kaiwaiata, he kaimātai, he kaihoahoa, he kaipūmanawa rānei — he wāhi tōu i te Kāhui.

contact.title: Whakapā
contact.lede: Tukua mai tētahi kōrero. Ka whakautu mātou i roto i ētahi rā mahi.
contact.cardLede: Mō te raihana, ngā mahi tahi, ngā pātai whānui rānei.
contact.name: Ingoa

footer.tagline: He papaho hapori e whakakotahi ana i ngā pūkōrero, rangahau, toi auaha, me te hangarau mō Aotearoa.
footer.copyright: Ngā motika katoa e rāhiritia ana.

login.title: Takiuru
login.lede: Uru ki te tomokanga kaiwaiata, ngā papamahi, me te tauranga Kāhui.

register.title: Hono mai ki te Kāhui
register.lede: Waihangahia tētahi pūkete kia uru ai ki te tomokanga kaiwaiata me ngā papamahi.

reset.title: Tautuhi anō i te kupuhipa
reset.lede: Ka tukuna mātou i tētahi hononga whakaora ki tō īmēra.

cookieConsent.title: Pihikete i tēnei pae
cookieConsent.body: Ka whakamahi mātou i ngā pihikete tino hiahiatia kia pai ai te mahi a te pae, me ngā pihikete tātaritanga whiriwhiri hei mōhio ki te āhua o tōna whakamahi. Ka taea e koe te whakaae ki ngā mea katoa, te whakakore i ngā mea kāore e tino hiahiatia, te whakarite rānei.
cookieConsent.reject: Whakakore i ngā mea kāore e tino hiahiatia

necessary.label: Tino hiahiatia
necessary.description: E hiahiatia ana kia pai ai te mahi a te pae. Kare e taea te weto.

analytics.label: Tātaritanga
analytics.description: Āwhina i a mātou kia mōhio ki te āhua o te whakamahi i te pae. Kua weto i te tīmatanga.

preferences.label: Ngā kōwhiringa
preferences.description: Maumahara ki tō reo me ngā tautuhinga e wātea ana.

privacyNotice.title: Whakaatu tūmataitinga
privacyNotice.summary: Ka whakamārama tēnei whakaatu i te āhua o tō Anamata Kāhui kohikohi, pupuri, whakamahi, me te whakapuaki i ō mōhiohio whaiaro i raro i te Ture Tūmataitinga 2020. Ka whakanuihia hoki e mātou ngā mātāpono CARE o Te Mana Raraunga Māori Data Sovereignty. Kei raro te tuhinga katoa i te reo Pākehā; ka whai mai he whakarāpopototanga reo Māori i muri i te ripanga ihirangi.
privacyNotice.tocWhy: He aha i kohikohi ai mātou
privacyNotice.tocHow: Me pēhea tā mātou pupuri, tiaki

cookiePolicy.title: Kaupapa here pihikete
cookiePolicy.summary: Ka whakarārangi tēnei kaupapa here i ia pihikete ka tautuhia e anamatakahui.co.nz, tāna mahi, te roa o tōna oranga, me te āhua e taea ai e koe te whakahaere. Kei raro te kaupapa here katoa i te reo Pākehā; ka whakamārama te whakarāpopototanga reo Māori i ngā kaupapa matua.

terms.title: Ngā here whakamahi
terms.summary: Ka whakahaeretia e ēnei here te whakamahi i anamatakahui.co.nz me ngā peka e whā. Mā te whakamahi i te pae ka whakaae koe ki ēnei here. Kei raro ngā here katoa i te reo Pākehā; ka whakamārama te whakarāpopototanga reo Māori i ngā kaupapa matua.

anonymous.title: Ngā mana tūmataitinga
anonymous.lede: Takiuru kia kite i ō raraunga, tono kia tangohia, tono kia mukua, panoni rānei i tō whakaaturanga whaiaro i te kōpaki.

dataExport.title: Tangohia ō raraunga
dataExport.description: Tikiake he kape o ō raraunga pūkete — kōtaha, whakaaturanga whaiaro i te kōpaki, ngā pātai whakapā, me ngā tāurunga rangapū whakaae.

dataDeletion.title: Tono kia mukua te pūkete
dataDeletion.description: Tāpaehia he tono kia mukua tō pūkete. Ka whakaū mātou mā īmēra i mua i te mukunga.

directory.title: Whakaaturanga i te kōpaki whaiaro
directory.description: Ka kitea pea tō kōtaha i te kōpaki whaiaro o te Kāhui (mō ngā kaiwaiata, kaiwhakangungu, kaihoahoa). Tahuri whakaweto kia tangohia koe.
directory.optedIn: E whakaaturia ana i te kōpaki whaiaro

cookies.title: Ngā kōwhiringa pihikete
cookies.description: Whakahoutia tō whakaae mō te tātaritanga me ngā pihikete kōwhiringa.

notFound.title: Kāore i kitea te whārangi
notFound.description: Kāore i te whārangi i rapu ai koe, kua nekehia rānei.

generic.title: Hē tētahi mea
generic.description: I pā mai tētahi hē ohorere. Kua whakamōhio mātou. Tēnā whakamātau anō.

research.title: Rangahau me te Reo
research.lede: Rangahau reo Māori, kaupapa ā-papa, me te taha whakawhiti kōrero e wātea ana ki te iwi whānui.

forFunders.title: Mā ngā Kaitautoko
forFunders.lede: Mā ngā tāngata, ngā rōpū hoki e whakatau ana me whakataetae i te Anamata Kāhui. He taunakitanga ora, he hurihuri tahua e mahi ana, me te tūmanako ahurea-kaitiakitanga e whakaiti i te tūraru.

waiata.title: Anamata Records
waiata.lede: Te peka puoro — ngā waiata kua tukua, ngā kaiwaiata, te pūranga tuaka, me ngā tātaritanga.
